def normalize_ar(s):
    # remove tashkeel and tatweel, unify hamza forms
    s=str(s)
    # remove diacritics
    s=re.sub('[\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u0653-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]','',s)
    # tatweel
    s=s.replace('ـ','')
    # unify alif forms
    s=s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s=s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # remove punctuation and non-letters/digits/space
    s=re.sub(r'[^\w\s]',' ',s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    s=re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s).strip()
    return s
target_full="لا تَزَوَّجَنَّ أُختَكَ"
target_snip="لا تَزَوَّ...َّ أُختَكَ"
norm_full=normalize_ar(target_full)
norm_full
